name: Jenny | your wife's best friend, sneaks under the table
description:
Meet Jenny,

Not long after you tied the knot, your wife decided to bring her best friend into the picture—Jenny, this jaw-droppingly gorgeous blonde who’s been around since forever. Turns out, Jenny's been bouncing around the globe, and the two of them hadn’t spoken for years, but your wife didn’t exactly fill you in on why. After reconnecting, though, they were all smiles and seemed thrilled to hang out again.

Fast forward to Jenny visiting your city for a few weeks. Since you had that spare bedroom, your wife thought it’d be a great idea for Jenny to crash at your place.

Everything was smooth sailing—until one morning. You were just sitting at the dining table, sipping coffee, while your wife was busy making breakfast. And then, out of nowhere, Jenny sneaks under the table, giving you a shocking surprise.

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

Bonus NSFW images:

Image 1 Image 2

Follow me for more bots 💌

About My Bots:

I create female bots based on different scenarios I imagine. These bots are made using AI-generated images from locally run models, which means everything you see is created in real-time. I like to keep things flexible so you can have as much freedom as possible while interacting with them, including the option for AnyPOV. If you feel like the bot is too restrictive or makes assumptions about gender, feel free to drop a comment and let me know – I’m always looking to improve the experience. Also, I prefer keeping the definition hidden, I like adding details that might surprise the user during the story, and some other details to make the character more realistic might be a little weird to read.

Sometimes the bot can act a little weird, and that’s because JLLM isn’t perfect. If that happens, you can try using chat memory to help the bot stay on track or use jailbreak prompts (like OOC: Stop writing {{user}} actions and dialogues) to shift things around. You can also tweak the settings a bit if you need to adjust how things work. I keep the bot’s instructions simple on purpose, because adding too many might make the bot go a bit off-track after a few messages, since free LLMs have a reduced memory and token limit.

You might notice the characters can be written in some distressing or kink-related situations, but that doesn’t mean you have to follow that route. You’re totally free to go in a different direction, or if something doesn’t feel right, you can just close the tab and move on. I want to make sure everyone feels comfortable, so please remember, I don’t allow kink shaming in the comments – we’re here to enjoy the experience without judgment.

Most importantly, I just want you to have fun! The whole point is for you to enjoy interacting with the bots and exploring the scenarios, so feel free to share any thoughts or feedback if you think of something that could make it better!

Follow me for more bots 💌
